# SoftenWise

SoftenWise is a software engineering company based in Turkey.
It builds custom software products, mobile applications, integration/automation systems, security audits, and technical consulting services.

## Primary URL
https://softenwise.com/

## Sitemap
https://softenwise.com/sitemap.xml

## Products
- SoftenWise Clinic — https://softenwise.com/urunler.html#softenwise-clinic · https://softenwiseclinic.com/
- Envantra (stok, satış, fatura) — https://softenwise.com/urunler.html#envantra · https://www.envantra.com/
- Otomini (ikinci el araç, değerleme, galeri) — https://softenwise.com/urunler.html#otomini · https://otomini.com/
- SoftenWise GeoMaps (kurumsal) — https://softenwise.com/urunler.html#geomaps
